prompt: Create a dramatic square-format anime trading-card style illustration of Blue-Eyes White Dragon, a metallic white and icy blue dragon lunging forward from a swirling dark blue vortex. The dragon has 1 large angular head, 2 glowing sapphire-blue eyes, an open snarling mouth with sharp triangular teeth, 2 long blade-like horns sweeping upward and backward, 2 extra side spikes projecting from the cheek and jaw area, 1 segmented serpentine neck, 2 raised forearms with large curved claws, 2 bent rear legs with talons, and multiple layered armor-like plates along the body and neck. Emphasize a glossy chrome-and-pearl surface with bright white highlights, deep cyan shadows, black ink outlines, and intense specular reflections. The creature should fill almost the entire frame in a dynamic diagonal pose, with its head near the upper center-left, claws reaching toward the viewer, and the tail/body curling into the background. The background is a high-energy circular portal made of luminous blue brush strokes, electric streaks, and radial motion blur, creating a sense of speed and power. Use icy white, chrome silver, electric blue, deep navy, high contrast, sharp anime linework, fantasy monster design, ultra-detailed scales and armor plates, glowing highlights, polished digital painting, no text, no border.
